biography: Justin K. Thompson was born on January 9, 1981 in New York City, New York, USA. He is a director, known for Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse (2023), Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse (2018) and Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2 (2013).
name: Justin K. Thompson
place_of_birth: New York City, New York, USA
